stemHtml: The purpose of the combustion chamber in a gas turbine engine is to provide…

options.a: high-velocity air to the compressor and exhaust section.
options.b: an optimal increase in the air`s temperature with a minimum loss of pressure.
options.c: high-temperature air to the engine-bleed-air system and turbine section.
options.d: an optimal increase in the air`s pressure with a minimum reduction in temperature.
